fields.title: Implement agent tool registration and action dispatch
fields.description:
Register the agent tool and dispatch actions.

## Deliverables
- src/agent/index.ts (tool entry point)
- src/agent/actions.ts (action handlers)

## Tool Schema
```typescript
const AgentParams = Type.Object({
  action: StringEnum(['spawn', 'send', 'wait', 'close', 'list']),
  // spawn
  type: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
  message: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
  complexity: Type.Optional(StringEnum(['low', 'medium', 'high'])),
  skills: Type.Optional(Type.Array(Type.String())),
  result_schema: Type.Optional(Type.Any()),
  // send/close
  id: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
  interrupt: Type.Optional(Type.Boolean()),
  // wait
  ids: Type.Optional(Type.Array(Type.String())),
  timeout_ms: Type.Optional(Type.Number()),
});
```

## Action Dispatch
Each action validates required params and delegates to AgentControl:
- spawn → control.spawn()
- send → control.send()
- wait → wait()
- close → control.shutdown()
- list → control.list()

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tool registered with pi.registerTool()
- [ ] Action dispatch validates required params per action
- [ ] spawn requires: type, message
- [ ] send requires: id, message
- [ ] wait requires: ids (non-empty)
- [ ] close requires: id
- [ ] list requires: nothing
- [ ] Errors returned as isError: true with clear message
- [ ] Effect errors mapped to tool errors
- [ ] Layer provided/run at tool execute time
fields.notes: Bridge between pi tool API and Effect services. Effect.runPromise at boundary.
fields.close_reason: Implemented and migrated non-blocking agent system
